CREATE TABLE positions (id Int32, lon Float64, lat Float64);
SELECT id, greatCircleAngle(lon, lat, 45, 0) AS arc FROM positions WHERE id IN (1, 2);
SELECT greatCircleAngle(0, 0, lon, lat) AS arc FROM (SELECT lon, lat FROM positions WHERE id = 3);
SELECT greatCircleAngle(0, 0, lon, lat) AS arc FROM (SELECT lon, lat FROM (SELECT * FROM positions LIMIT 2) AS p) AS sub;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM positions WHERE greatCircleAngle(lon, lat, 90, 0) > 0;
SELECT greatCircleAngle(lon, lat, 0, 90) AS arc FROM (SELECT lon, lat FROM positions ORDER BY id DESC) AS ordered_positions;

WITH (SELECT lon, lat FROM positions WHERE id = 1) AS first_point, (SELECT lon, lat FROM positions WHERE id = 2) AS second_point SELECT greatCircleAngle(first_point.lon, first_point.lat, second_point.lon, second_point.lat) AS arc;
